title: Advisor-Strategy Configuration
description: Schema for the .loa.config.yaml::advisor_strategy section. Cycle-108 sprint-1 T1.A. Closes PRD §5 FR-1, SDD §3.1-§3.2, and NFR-Sec1 hard-pin via const-pinning of review/audit role tiers.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Strict const-1 for cycle-108. Future versions dispatch through versioned schemas (SDD §3.4).

enabled.description: Master switch. Default false (opt-in). When false, all consumers behave identically to pre-cycle-108 (advisor-everywhere).

tier_resolution.description: Tier-alias resolution mode. static pins to .loa.config.yaml commit SHA at load time (Sprint 3 benchmark REQUIRED mode). dynamic re-resolves per invocation. SDD §3.6.

defaults.description: Role-to-tier defaults. NFR-Sec1: review and audit are const-pinned to advisor.

review.description: NFR-Sec1 hard-pin: review role MUST resolve to advisor tier. Schema-level enforcement (SDD §3.2, ATK-A1 closure).

audit.description: NFR-Sec1 hard-pin: audit role MUST resolve to advisor tier.

tier_aliases.description: Tier → per-provider model-id mapping. Within-provider only per OOS-4.

per_skill_overrides.description: Optional per-skill tier overrides. Loader §3.3 step 4 rejects review/audit skill overrides to non-advisor tier with exit 78. Skill names MUST exist in the skill registry (runtime check).

audited_review_skills.description: Schema-pinned allowlist of skills permitted to use review tier (cycle-108 ATK-A1 closure SDD §3.7). Adding a new review skill requires a schema-version bump approved by operator via CODEOWNERS.

max_cost_usd.description: Pre-run cost cap (USD). Harness aborts if estimate exceeds. NFR-P3 / IMP-011.

historical_medians_path.description: Path to historical-medians.json (CODEOWNERS-protected, computed by tools/modelinv-rollup.sh). ATK-A6 closure.
